2002November 3, 2002

🇰🇷 Seoul, Korea

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Seoul, Korea, November 3, 2002 -- November 8, 2002

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2002-11-seoul-korea

20 Resolutions

557Plenary
Streamline publication of Modular APs
SC 4 requires all projects developing modular APs and Application Modules to use the XSL development environment in the STEP Repository. Deviations from this requirement shall be approved by the ap...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
556Plenary
Ensure adequate representation in comparative assessment of ISO 14649 and ISO 10303-238
SC 4 requests SC 1 to ensure adequate representation of SC 4 development activities within the proposed studies, noting the existing participation of SC 4 experts in SC 1 meetings.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
555Plenary
Consider developing STEP AP for ISO/IEC 62264 Part 2
SC 4 invites JWG 15 to consider the possibility of developing a STEP Application Protocol with the scope of the information defined in ISO/IEC 62264 Part 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
554Plenary
Assert SC 4 position on overlaps with ISO/IEC 62264
SC 4 asks its member bodies to take appropriate actions to ensure that these comments will be taken into account in their answer to the ballot, from the ISO side as well as from the IEC side.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
553Plenary
Cancel ISO 15531 parts 21, 33, and 45 from MANDATE
SC 4 cancels ISO 15531-21, ISO 15531-33 and ISO 15531-45, and removes ISO 15531-21 from the MANDATE P1 project, ISO 15531-33 from the P2 project and ISO 15531-45 from the P3 project. Nevertheless t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
552Plenary
Promote development of ISO 13584-511 for fasteners
SC 4 requests national member bodies to promote the achievements to date by CNIS and the proposed project for development of “Mechanical systems and components for general use -- Reference dictiona...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
551Plenary
Approve minor revision of ISO 10303-214:2001
SC 4 approves the creation of a new edition of ISO 10303-214 as a minor revision to correct errors in EXPRESS, Mapping Tables, Application Object definitions, and orthography.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
550Plenary
Establish SC 4 Education and Outreach Rapporteur
SC 4 establishes an Education and Outreach Rapporteur as a focal point for SC 4 outreach, education, and promotional activities. This should be closely linked to International STEP Centers (ISC) re...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
549Plenary
Expand part marking standard to other industry sectors
In anticipation of a request from ISO/TC 20 to take over the task of expanding the part marking standard to cover other industry sectors, SC 4 directs its Secretariat to respond positively to such ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
548Plenary
Cooperate with OAGI
SC 4 welcomes the request for a formal membership of the Open Applications Group. Inc. (OAG) to ISO IEC ITU UN/ECE MoU. Based on the library described in OAGIS 8.0 SC 4 sees a complementary activit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
547Plenary
Cancel inactive ATS projects
SC 4 resolves to cancel 10303 parts 302, 318, 324ed2, and 333.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
546Plenary
Cancel AP226 for ship mechanical systems
SC 4 resolves to cancel 10303-226, Ship mechanical systems.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
545Plenary
Cancel ISO 10303-29
SC 4 cancels ISO 10303-29, Implementation methods: Java programming language binding to the EXPRESS modeling language from its work program.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
544Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-28ed2 |Heidi Preston | |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its deep appreciation to KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) and KSTEP (Korea STEP Center) and the staff of Seoul COEX Center for their efforts in organizing this meeti...

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
Appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons. We appreciate your representation to and for ISO/TC 184/SC 4. A special thank you to the SC 4 Liaison Plenary presenters for their insightful and comprehensive pr...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 extends its sincere appreciation for the efforts of Ms. Teresa Brittingham during her tenure as Deputy Secretary. SC 4 wishes her well in her future endeavors. SC 4 welcomes the new Deputy Sec...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Joe Brazy (ManTech) and Chris Kreiler (CACI) for their untiring efforts and excellent performance as acting Deputy Secretary before and during the meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to NIST for their support in the development of the STEP repository.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
